block_01: Ordinarily, the saying goes, “third time lucky” unfortunately, in Google’s case, its “third fine unlucky!”
block_02: The EU has slapped Google with it’s third fine in two years! Bringing the grand total to almost $10 Billion!
block_03: Google stands accused of abusing market dominance by restricting third-party rivals from displaying search ads between 2006 and 2016.
block_04: Google (Alphabet Inc) is currently valued at over $850 Billion & stands at 5th place in the NASDAQ Index.
block_05: As you can see from the chart, the stock has displayed strong growth since the beginning of the year.
block_06: Will this latest fine upset Google’s investors & prompt a sell off, or will Google continue it’s climb, reaching it’s previous highest highs?
